UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Information and role-based access control details for users of the system.

uid.description: The unique user ID from Firebase Auth.

department.description: The division or department where the user works.

active.description: Whether the user's account is active.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the profile was registered.

CallUpEntry.title: CallUpEntry
CallUpEntry.description: A secure official letter, task, message, or document registered in the system requiring trackable action.

recordNumber.description: The system-generated record number, e.g. SB/CU/2026/0001

referenceNumber.description: The external reference number of the document.

receivedDate.description: The date when the document was officially received.

subject.description: The subject line or brief title of the record.

source.description: The agency, person, or division that sent the document.

priority.description: Urgency level of the action required.

status.description: Current resolution status of the record.

dueDate.description: The deadline date by which action must be taken.

responsibleOfficers.description: List of UIDs for all officers who are assigned to act on this record.

attachments.description: List of secure files uploaded to Firebase Storage.

completionNotes.description: Resolution feedback, notes, or comments left upon completion.

completionAttachment.description: The delivery report or final completed document uploaded to Storage.

submissionDate.description: The date when the final action was completed/submitted.

submittedBy.description: Name of the person who submitted the completion.

SystemNotification.title: SystemNotification
SystemNotification.description: Alert or notification directed to a specific user about upcoming tasks, changes, or system events.

read.description: Whether the notification has been read.

link.description: Optional in-app link or tab path.

ActivityLog.title: ActivityLog
ActivityLog.description: An immutable audit trail log of administrative or action-oriented tasks completed in the system.

action.description: What action was performed, e.g. Create, Update, Login.

UnitContact.title: UnitContact
UnitContact.description: Unit and branch contact information directory.

unitName.description: Name of the unit or branch.

/callup_entries/{entryId}.description: The central list of call up records.

/unit_contacts/{contactId}.description: Directory of unit and branch telephone contacts.
